scripts.service:start: BUN_PATH=$(command -v bun) && sudo env BUN="$BUN_PATH" "$BUN_PATH" modules/service/manage.ts start
scripts.service:stop: BUN_PATH=$(command -v bun) && sudo env BUN="$BUN_PATH" "$BUN_PATH" modules/service/manage.ts stop
scripts.service:restart: BUN_PATH=$(command -v bun) && sudo env BUN="$BUN_PATH" "$BUN_PATH" modules/service/manage.ts restart
scripts.service:status: BUN_PATH=$(command -v bun) && sudo env BUN="$BUN_PATH" "$BUN_PATH" modules/service/manage.ts status
scripts.service:uninstall: BUN_PATH=$(command -v bun) && sudo env BUN="$BUN_PATH" "$BUN_PATH" modules/service/manage.ts uninstall
